item.description:
hi, i’m josh

i like to build and break things on the internet.

some of my public work can be found below;

  • ransomwatch - the open ransomware claim tracker
  • transl8 - a x-platform query DSL for network search engines
  • isolator - remote browser isolation for Tor sessions
  • bebop - a framework for de-anonymising Tor and reverse proxy hosts
  • multisocks - a scaling relay overlay for tor traffic balancing
  • securitytools - a curated set of projects for security investigations
  • kerchow - my swiss army-knife terminal extension binfile collection
  • urlgen - a search engine overlay for OSINT investigators
  • honeypots - a handful of frontends to commonly abused services
  • statuspage - the underground statuspage

you can find me on x & github or by mailing josh@atdotcomdotcomdot.com
